items.name: Pure Blossom Lace Suit
items.description:
Clean, delicate, and beautifully detailed — the Frost Lace Suit wraps the body in soft white floral lace, creating a fresh and elegant silhouette.
Perfect for soft glam, angelic fits, luxury looks, and clean minimal outfits.
The icy-white lace texture brings a refined, dreamy vibe that stands out effortlessly.

🔗  GMARI: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=GMARI&CreatorType=Group
